message:
TEST-GOOGLE-DRIVE: add not-found connector suite path

Refs flywheel_connectors-355cd

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+ciborium.workspace = true
 wiremock.workspace = true
 fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
 fcp-e2e = { path = "../../crates/fcp-e2e" }
